title: Neighbors Only
narrative: Welcome to the Sorting Station! Here's the catch: you can ONLY swap crates that are right next to each other. Watch the comparison counter — every comparison costs you!

levels.name: The Rule
levels.hint: Tap two NEIGHBORING crates to compare them. If the left one is bigger, they swap!

levels.name: Biggest Bubbles Up
levels.hint: Follow the arrows! Compare each pair left to right. Watch the biggest number float to the end.

levels.name: Keep Passing
levels.hint: One pass isn't enough! Keep making passes until nothing swaps. Watch the counter climb...

levels.name: The Cost
levels.hint: 10 crates... this is going to take a while with only neighbor swaps. How high does the counter go?
